title: WebNowCraft
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Frequires%2Ffabric-api_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)[![Requires Fabric API](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.3.0/assets/cozy/requires/cloth-config-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
### For Spotify ![HUD example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc01187ad198b790aaf8b198a3cb060e191f0361.png)
### For Youtube ![for youtbe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/773ccfedbea62fadde14fdfa2eaade4714cf4274.png)
# Prerequisites 1. Minecraft 1.21.4 or 1.20.1 or 1.19.4 or 1.21.1(Fabric,Forge,NeoForge) 2. Fabric API 3. ClothConfig API 3. Spotify Desktop App + Spicetify CLI or WNP installed browser # Install ### 1 For Sptify Desktop 1. Install the [Spicetify CLI](https://spicetify.app/docs/getting-started)). 2. Run the following command to install and enable the WebNowPlaying extension: ``` spicetify config extensions webnowplaying.js spicetify apply ``` ### 1.2 For YouTube, Twitch, etc. 1. (Firefox) https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/webnowplaying/
1.2 (Chrome) https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/webnowplaying/jfakgfcdgpghbbefmdfjkbdlibjgnbli
2. Install it!!
# Configuration In-game, find Webnowcraft in the mod list in the Mod Menu and press the settings button to adjust the following parameters. X Offset / Y Offset: Adjusts the display position from the edge of the screen. Scale: Changes the HUD size between 50% and 200%. Anchor Top-Left: Turn on to position the HUD from the top left, or turn off to position it from the top right.
## Other In the future, we plan to provide files for ~~Forge~~ and ~~1.16.5~~ 1.8.9
Also, you can freely change the HUD color.
Most releases are on Fabric.
Supporting Forge is a pain.
For Dev https://github.com/pa81/Webnowcraft
